definitions.solved: The app solver completed a valid grid within 500 moves using only the named profile.
definitions.soloIncrementalUnlocks: Puzzles solved by Tier 1 plus this technique that Tier 1 alone did not solve.
definitions.committedLeaveOneOutLoss: Puzzles solved by all 17 committed coaching techniques but not when this Tier 2 technique is disabled.
definitions.allSupportedLeaveOneOutLoss: Puzzles solved by all 22 supported techniques but not when this Tier 2 technique is disabled; provisional detectors may act as fallbacks.
definitions.shapleyMarginalPuzzles: Average marginal puzzle coverage contributed by the technique across every ordering of the seven Tier 2 techniques.
definitions.deterministicCaveat: These metrics follow deterministic or explicitly named move-selection policies. They do not prove necessity across every mathematically possible move order.

dataQuality.expectedGrain: one row per shipped canonical puzzle
